title: Intense Polish Cauliflower Bowl
description: A velvety, turmeric-infused cauliflower bowl enriched with smoked shio-cured cabbage and fresh dill, offering a savory, satvik twist on Polish comfort food.

ingredients.name: Turmeric powder
ingredients.notes: adds vibrant color and anti-inflammatory benefits

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) and line a baking sheet with parchment.
Toss cauliflower florets with olive oil, turmeric, sea salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Roast cauliflower for 20 minutes, stirring halfway, until golden and tender.
While cauliflower roasts, slice shio‑cured cabbage into thin ribbons and set aside.
In a bowl, combine roasted cauliflower, sliced cabbage, lemon juice, tahini, and chopped dill, mixing gently.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt if needed.
Sprinkle toasted pumpkin seeds over the bowl and drizzle a drizzle of olive oil.
Serve warm for a velvety, savory Polish bowl that satisfies satvik principles.
